blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,684 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
